Elizabeth, the widow of Union general Henry Halleck, co-founded the New York City hospital for this disease that's now Memorial Sloan Kettering
New bride Annie was widowed in 77 days when Robert Gould Shaw went to "Glory" leading Black troops against the defenses of this S.C. city

Virginia, the widow of this sailor man, was on hand when his D.C. monument by female sculptor Vinnie Ream was dedicated in 1881
Fittingly, Union General Philip Sheridan's wife Irene was born in Fort Union, N.M., built to protect this trail
It seems Ellen Marcy loved future Confederate general A.P. Hill more than this man whom she married, getting a name that rhymed
Brahms' string these have an extra viola to get the odd number of players; Schubert doubles down on the cello

[IMAGE CLUE]
This French composer known for evocative piano works only left us one movement of his one symphony from 1880

[IMAGE CLUE]
"See, The Conqu'ring Hero Comes" is heard in Handel's oratorio about this title hero, often performed around Hanukkah
Nominated for a 2026 Grammy, the guitar duo album "Slavic Sessions" includes 2 of this Czech composer's "Slavonic Dances"

This work by Saint-Saëns is also called a "Zoological Fantasy"
Co-starred with Duchovny & the Hoff, respectively:Gillian & Pamela
All roads lead to them:Diane & Nathan
Just like that Amity chief:Adrien & Adam
I hear an Irish river calling:Michael & Molly
We've heard stranger things:Heather & Gaten
"An Affair to Remember" & "Sleepless in Seattle" have pivotal scenes on top of this building in New York City
Construction of this Seattle structure that opened in 1962 cost $4.5 million; a 2018 renovation, about $100 million

Architect Paul R. Williams was part of the team that designed The Theme Building, a space-age design at this airport
Britannica notes that this tallest building in the U.K. "resembles the shaft of a stiletto switchblade"

An iconic symbol of Rajasthan, the Hawa Mahal is a palace in this metropolis, often called "The Pink City"
Coloring your world in a not-so-great way, it follows scarlet & yellow
Bee aware this skin reaction is also called urticaria
Claiming 11,000 lives before containment, the worst-ever outbreak of this virus plagued West Africa from 2014 to 2016
Guess what, TV's "House"? It is in fact this auto-immune disorder; the discoid type affects only the skin, not organs
The HIB vaccine is highly effective vs. bacterial this acute respiratory illness, which tends to strike kids 7 or younger
In 1941 Dr. Glenn Seaborg went fission, producing this radioactive element in a cyclotron
As an adjective it means superlative; as a verb tense, it uses "had"
This fancy adjective means relating to rain

Frangipani is another name for this fragrant flower that's popular for leis
Earl Tinker runs the Illinois & Union Paper Co. in a Booth Tarkington novel titled this, meaning one who rules by money

final.clue: In 2025 a church begun in 1882 became the tallest building in this city
